diagrams.title: Basic Pigeonhole Distribution
diagrams.description: Shows 7 pigeons in 6 holes - demonstrates that at least one hole contains 2 pigeons
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the basic principle: n > m guarantees repetition

diagrams.title: Generalized Pigeonhole with Remainders
diagrams.description: Distribution of n items into m boxes showing ceiling function result

diagrams.title: Birthday Problem Visualization
diagrams.description: 366 days represented as boxes, people as balls - shows guaranteed collision

diagrams.title: Ramsey K6 Triangle
diagrams.description: Complete graph K6 with red/blue edges showing monochrome triangle guaranteed
diagrams.purpose: Visualize R(3,3)=6 proof using pigeonhole principle
